title: lissochilus quadrilobus
intro: Lissochilus quadrilobus, also known as the four-lobed water orchid, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lissochilus quadrilobus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various infections. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine practices in Africa.
